manifest.name: currency-converter
manifest.author: dreamlayer
manifest.description: Look at a foreign price tag and see it in your own money — live rates, right on the panel.
manifest.forwho: For travellers and anyone shopping across currencies.
long: Abroad, prices stop being abstract. Look at a tag or a menu and the look-at-a-thing panel shows the amount in your home currency, inline — no phone, no mental math.
It converts with live exchange rates (free, no account) and shows the rate it used, so you always know what you’re really paying.
Private by design: only the number and its currency are looked up — never where you are or what you bought.
